title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Atos India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Atos India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Atos India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About Atos India:
Atos India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atos India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
